documentation_changes_summary: Updated sort-order description in docs/features/forums.md to remove the PostgreSQL-only NULLS LAST literal and note MySQL native NULL-last ordering under DESC. Added defense-in-depth note documenting the boardId IN (...) predicate in listRecentTopics.
final_test_outcomes: 150/150 unit tests pass; 2/2 integration tests skipped cleanly (SFUS_DB_INTEGRATION=1 not set); lint and typecheck clean.
